summary: A possession-dominant 4-3-3 (75.8%) with purpose and vertical thrust, but with frailties at the back if the structure is breached.
style: 4-3-3 — possession with purpose and vertical play, wingers & fullbacks making deep runs behind, lots of 1v1s and crosses into a double-occupied half-space.

counterReliance.note: Possession-dominant, builds the game on the ball

strengths: Dominant possession (75.8%) used with purpose and verticality
Runners in behind from wingers and fullbacks
Goal-poacher up top to finish the chances created
weaknesses: Defensive frailties at times if the rest-defence is played through

keyPlayers.name: Hyun-Gyu Oh
keyPlayers.note: Proper goal-poacher, great in the air, 23 goal involvements this season

tactics: Control the ball and attack vertically, with wide players and fullbacks running beyond. The rest-defence structure is important — teams that get past it can find space. Group A looks exceptionally tight.
sources: John Walker (@johnwalker_1986) — pre-tournament tactical scouting, May–Jun 2026
